name: sololog-client

scripts.build: npm run prepare:content && vue-tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build && node scripts/run-tauri.mjs dev
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && node scripts/run-tauri.mjs build --bundles nsis --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && node scripts/run-tauri.mjs build --bundles dmg --target aarch64-apple-darwin

description: SoloLog desktop client powered by Vue and Tauri
author: chain-code
